name: Chinese Coleslaw
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces crushed pineapple (packed in its own juice)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the shredded Chinese cabbage, crushed pineapple, and sliced water chestnuts.
2. Add the chopped green onions and freshly grated ginger to the bowl with the vegetables.
3. In a separate small bowl, mix together the mayonnaise, mustard, and gingerroot until well combined.
4. Pour the dressing over the cabbage mixture and gently toss everything together until evenly coated.
5. Cover the bowl and chill in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
